endpoints.name: Get all open orders for a client or an account

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: AccountGroupKey
parameters.description: The key of the account group to which the order belongs.

parameters.name: AccountKey
parameters.description: Unique key identifying the account that owns the orders.

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: Unique key identifying the client that owns the orders.

parameters.name: FieldGroups
parameters.description: Specifies which data to return. Default is empty, meaning Display and Formatting information is not included.

children.name: DisplayAndFormat
children.description: Adds information about the instrument, which is useful for display and formatting. This includes Currency Code, Decimals, Instrument Description, Display Decimals, Price format and Symbol

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange. This includes Exchange name, exchange code and open status.

children.name: Greeks
children.description: Greeks for Option(s), only applicable to Fx Options , Contract Options and Contract options CFD

parameters.name: OrderId
parameters.description: The id of the order

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Selects only a subset of open orders to be returned. Default is to return working orders only.

children.name: All
children.description: Returns all orders regardless of type

children.name: Working
children.description: Returns only top level orders and OCO orders. Stop/Limit orders details are available in the RelatedOrders properties.

parameters.name: WatchlistId
parameters.description: Selects only orders those instruments belongs to the given watchlist id

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: Unique id of the client.

parameters.name: FieldGroups
parameters.description: Optional. Specification of FieldGroups to be included in response model. Defaults to "ExchangeInfo" if not provided.

children.name: DisplayAndFormat
children.description: Adds information about the instrument, which is useful for display and formatting. This includes Currency Code, Decimals, Instrument Description, Display Decimals, Price format and Symbol

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange. This includes Exchange name, exchange code and open status.

children.name: Greeks
children.description: Greeks for Option(s), only applicable to Fx Options , Contract Options and Contract options CFD

parameters.name: OrderId
parameters.description: Unique id of the order.

endpoints.name: Get all open orders for the client to which the logged-in user belongs

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: FieldGroups
parameters.description: Optional. Specification of FieldGroups to be included in response model. Defaults to "ExchangeInfo" if not provided.

children.name: DisplayAndFormat
children.description: Adds information about the instrument, which is useful for display and formatting. This includes Currency Code, Decimals, Instrument Description, Display Decimals, Price format and Symbol

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange. This includes Exchange name, exchange code and open status.

children.name: Greeks
children.description: Greeks for Option(s), only applicable to Fx Options , Contract Options and Contract options CFD

parameters.name: MultiLegOrderId
parameters.description: Return only multi-leg orders with the given common MultiLegOrderId.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Optional. Selects only a subset of open orders to be returned based on status of the open order. Default is "Working" (i.e. orders related to working orders are excluded).

children.name: All
children.description: Returns all orders regardless of type

children.name: Working
children.description: Returns only top level orders and OCO orders. Stop/Limit orders details are available in the RelatedOrders properties.

endpoints.name: Create a subscription to open orders

parameters.name: $inlinecount
parameters.description: Specifies that the response to the request should include a count of the number of entries in the collection

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: Specifies an entity id to start retrieving entries from. This is normally only used in generated nextlinks.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: Arguments
parameters.description: Arguments for the subscription request.

children.name: AccountGroupKey
children.description: The key of the account group to which the order belongs.

children.name: AccountKey
children.description: Unique key identifying the account that owns the orders.

children.name: ClientKey
children.description: Unique key identifying the client that owns the orders.

children.name: FieldGroups
children.description: Specifies which data to return. Default is empty, meaning Display and Formatting information is not included.

children.name: DisplayAndFormat
children.description: Adds information about the instrument, which is useful for display and formatting. This includes Currency Code, Decimals, Instrument Description, Display Decimals, Price format and Symbol

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange. This includes Exchange name, exchange code and open status.

children.name: Greeks
children.description: Greeks for Option(s), only applicable to Fx Options , Contract Options and Contract options CFD

children.name: OrderId
children.description: The id of the order

children.name: Status
children.description: Selects only a subset of open orders to be returned. Default is to return working orders only.

children.name: All
children.description: Returns all orders regardless of type

children.name: Working
children.description: Returns only top level orders and OCO orders. Stop/Limit orders details are available in the RelatedOrders properties.

children.name: WatchlistId
children.description: Selects only orders those instruments belongs to the given watchlist id

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The streaming context id that this request is associated with. This parameter must only contain letters (a-z) and numbers (0-9) as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Optional Media type (RFC 2046) of the serialized data updates that are streamed to the client. Currently only application/json and application/x-protobuf is supported. If an unrecognized format is specified, the subscription end point will return HTTP status code 400 - Bad format.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Mandatory client specified reference id for the subscription. This parameter must only contain alphanumberic characters as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). Cannot start with _. It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: RefreshRate
parameters.description: Optional custom refresh rate, measured in milliseconds, between each data update. Note that it is not possible to get a refresh rate lower than the rate specified in the customer service level agreement (SLA).

parameters.name: ReplaceReferenceId
parameters.description: Reference id of the subscription that should be replaced.

parameters.name: Tag Obsolete
parameters.description: : Optional client specified tag used for grouping subscriptions.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: Unique streaming context ID part of the streaming session.

parameters.name: Tag
parameters.description: Optional. Tag that subscriptions are marked with.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: Unique streaming context ID part of the streaming session.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Unique reference ID of the subscription.
